Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 512}I've gotta study my ass off for the exams when I get back...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 512}The university entrance exams are in less than two months. The competition's about to begin.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 513}Why'd you have to remind me about the exams...?[n]{f 1 1}
